hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$/i.test(f)){console.log(f)}})" | { read -r f && bunx biome check --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/i.test(f)){console.log(f)}})" | { read -r f && cd /c/gitrepo/Nimbus && bun run typecheck || exit 2; } 2>&1
